description: Groups controller edge stability: response key set, field types, source enum, and fallback propagation

cases.description: Response object always has exactly two keys: groups and source
Source field is constrained to 'nodebb' or 'fallback' regardless of upstream state
Each group item has correct stable types: string, string, string, integer, boolean, boolean, integer
When upstream returns empty array with OK status, source remains 'nodebb' and groups is empty
When provider throws, controller returns fallback shape with empty groups
When provider returns error status, controller returns fallback shape
Controller returns the exact same object reference from usecase without modification
Sequential calls return consistent shape (two keys, groups is array, source is string) regardless of varying upstream state
Groups field is always an array (never null/undefined) and preserves mixed hidden/deleted items without mutation

notes: Edge stability tests ensure the controller layer adds no extra keys, coerces no types, and faithfully propagates usecase output. The usecase handles filtering and fallback logic; the controller must be a transparent delegate.
